children.heading: Simultaneous service
children.label: a Simultaneous service
children.text: No person other than an officer or employee of the Department of Agriculture may serve simultaneously on more than one advisory committee, unless authorized by the Secretary.

children.heading: Service by more than one officer or employee of corporation or non-Federal entity
children.label: b Service by more than one officer or employee of corporation or non-Federal entity
children.text: Not more than one officer or employee of any corporation or other non-Federal entity, including all subsidiaries and affiliates thereof, may serve on the same advisory committee at any one time, unless authorized by the Secretary.

children.heading: Maximum length
children.label: c Maximum length
children.text: No person other than an officer or employee of the Department of Agriculture may serve for more than six consecutive years on an advisory committee, unless authorized by the Secretary.
